items.title: Bitcoin ETFs pull in $462M as BTC briefly tops $73K
items.summary: BlackRock’s IBIT led inflows with $307 million as almost all US spot Bitcoin ETFs posted gains on Wednesday, extending a three-day inflow streak totaling $1.1 billion.

items.title: Bitcoin traders, alert: The rally is nearing a two-year 'make or break' price zone
items.summary: The cryptocurrency traders near key price zone that has marked major turning points over the past two years.

items.title: Anthropic reopens Pentagon talks as tech groups push Trump to drop risk tag: FT
items.summary: Anthropic previously secured a $200 million Pentagon contract, and its AI has been used in classified operations, including support for US air strikes on Iran, the Financial Times reports.

items.title: Ether, solana, xrp surge 8% as crypto markets rally on easing war fears
items.summary: Ether surged 7.5%, dogecoin jumped 7.5%, and solana added 5.3% as global equities rebounded and $700 million flowed into U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs since the start of March.

items.title: Crypto stocks rally as Trump, regulators signal pro-crypto policy shift
items.summary: Bitcoin has jumped as well, increasing 7.6% in the last 24 hours, while Ether is up more than 8.3% to trade at $2,132.

items.title: Google uncovers iOS exploit kit used in crypto phishing attacks
items.summary: Researchers say fake crypto websites deployed an iOS exploit kit capable of stealing wallet seed phrases and other financial data.

items.title: Altcoin chatter sinks to 2-year low as Bitcoin holds attention
items.summary: While altcoin interest on social media is at its lowest in 24 months, it could pick up again once Bitcoin’s rally starts to fade, according to crypto trader Michaël van de Poppe.

items.title: Bitcoin tops $72,000 as ETFs pull $155 million, extending two week inflow streak

items.title: Sky token jumps 10% after governance vote causes bullish tilt in market dynamics
